name: disconnect
lambda: lambda c: c.writer.write(b"See you next time.\r\n")
lambda c, ps, cs: ps.to_room(c, c.name+" has disconneced.", cs.get_message("disconnect"))

name: say
lambda: lambda c, cs, p, ps, msg: p.to_room(ps, msg, cs.get_message("say"))

name: tell
lambda: lambda c, msg, m: c.writer.write(b"You tell {m.get_name()}, '{msg}'\r\n")
lambda c, msg, m, eh: eh.to_mobile(c, c.cmd, m, msg)
usage: lambda c, msg: c.writer.write(b"Invalid target.") if m.invalid_target(msg)

name: inventory
lambda: lambda c: c.writer.write(b"You are carrying: \r\n") or [i.print_name(c.writer) for i in c.get_items()]

name: examine
lambda: lambda c, msg, usage: c.get_fuzzy_item(msg, usage).print_description(c.writer) if c.get_fuzzy_item(msg, usage) is not None else None
usage: lambda m: m.writer.write(b"You must specify a valid item in your inventory.\r\n")

name: north
message: %c has left the room, heading north.

name: look
lambda: lambda c, zs, r: zs.print_description(c.writer, r)
